all.en: Please be advised that our office will operate on a modified schedule during the upcoming holidays.
all.zh: 謹此通知，於即將到來的連假期間，本辦公室將採行調整後的作息時間。

all.en: The official holiday period will run from Thursday, December twenty-fourth through Sunday, January third.
all.zh: 正式假期將自十二月二十四日星期四起至一月三日星期日止。

all.en: On December twenty-fourth, the office will close early at one o'clock in the afternoon.
all.zh: 十二月二十四日當天，辦公室將於下午一點提早關閉。

all.en: Employees are encouraged to wrap up urgent tasks before the early dismissal time.
all.zh: 員工請於提早下班時間之前完成緊急事務。

all.en: The office will remain closed on December twenty-fifth and December twenty-sixth.
all.zh: 辦公室將於十二月二十五日及二十六日全日休息。

all.en: Limited staffing will be available from December twenty-eighth through December thirtieth.
all.zh: 十二月二十八日至三十日期間將維持簡編人力上班。

all.en: Working hours on those three days will be reduced from ten o'clock to three o'clock.
all.zh: 該三日的辦公時間將縮短為上午十點至下午三點。

all.en: On December thirty-first, the office will close at noon for the New Year celebrations.
all.zh: 十二月三十一日當天，辦公室將於中午關閉以迎接新年慶祝活動。

all.en: January first and January second are recognized as paid holidays for all full-time staff.
all.zh: 一月一日及一月二日為全體正職員工的給薪假日。

all.en: Regular business hours will resume on Monday, January fourth at nine in the morning.
all.zh: 正常營業時間將於一月四日星期一上午九點恢復。

all.en: Customers can reach our support team through the online chat service during this period.
all.zh: 此期間客戶可透過線上聊天服務聯繫我們的客服團隊。

all.en: Emergency requests should be sent to the after-hours support email for priority handling.
all.zh: 緊急需求請寄至非營業時間支援信箱，將優先處理。

all.en: Please update your email auto-reply messages with the modified office hours information.
all.zh: 請將電子郵件自動回覆內容更新為調整後的辦公時間資訊。

all.en: A standard template has been provided by the corporate communications team for your use.
all.zh: 企業傳播團隊已提供標準範本供大家使用。

all.en: Voicemail greetings should also reflect the holiday operating schedule.
all.zh: 語音信箱問候語亦應反映假期作業時間。

all.en: Building security will continue to monitor the premises throughout the entire holiday period.
all.zh: 大樓保全將於整個假期間持續監控辦公空間。

all.en: Please ensure that all confidential materials are stored in locked cabinets before leaving.
all.zh: 離開前請務必將所有機密資料存放於上鎖的櫃子中。

all.en: Personal valuables should not be left at workstations during the extended closure.
all.zh: 貴重個人物品請勿於長假期間留置於辦公桌上。

all.en: Heating systems will be set to a low temperature to conserve energy when offices are empty.
all.zh: 辦公室無人時，暖氣將調至低溫以節省能源。

all.en: If you require building access during closed days, please contact the facilities team in advance.
all.zh: 若您需要在閉館日進入大樓，請事先聯絡總務團隊。

all.en: Access requests must be submitted at least forty-eight hours before the desired entry time.
all.zh: 進入申請須於希望進入時間至少四十八小時前提出。

all.en: We wish all employees and their families a safe and joyful holiday season.
all.zh: 祝福全體員工及其家人擁有平安喜悅的假期。

all.en: Thank you for your cooperation in helping our offices run smoothly throughout the year.
all.zh: 感謝大家全年來協助辦公室順利運作的配合。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you back energized and ready for the new year ahead.
all.zh: 我們期待您充滿活力歸來，迎接嶄新一年的到來。

all.en: A virtual holiday gathering will be hosted through the corporate video platform on December twenty-second at four in the afternoon.
all.zh: 公司視訊平台將於十二月二十二日下午四點舉辦線上節慶聚會。

all.en: All staff are warmly invited to share festive greetings and reflect on the achievements of the past year together.
all.zh: 誠摯邀請全體同仁一同分享節慶祝福，並回顧過去一年的共同成就。

all.en: Year-end performance bonuses will be deposited into employee accounts by December twentieth, according to the standard payroll cycle.
all.zh: 年終績效獎金將依照標準薪資週期，於十二月二十日前匯入員工帳戶。

all.en: Any unused vacation days from this calendar year must be requested before the holiday closure begins.
all.zh: 本年度尚未使用的休假，必須於連假開始前提出申請。

all.en: The human resources team has published the official holiday calendar on the employee portal for easy reference.
all.zh: 人力資源團隊已將正式假期行事曆公布於員工入口網站，方便查閱。

all.en: Department managers should confirm coverage plans for any critical functions that must remain operational over the holidays.
all.zh: 各部門主管應確認假期間仍須維持運作之關鍵職能的代理計畫。

all.en: Mail and parcel deliveries will be suspended at the headquarters from December twenty-fourth through January third.
all.zh: 總部將於十二月二十四日至一月三日暫停信件與包裹收件服務。

all.en: Vendors and clients have already been notified of these schedule changes through our official corporate website.
all.zh: 我們已透過公司官方網站通知供應商與客戶相關時程調整。

all.en: Please review the updated emergency contact list distributed by the operations team earlier this week.
all.zh: 請參閱營運團隊於本週稍早發送的最新緊急聯絡名單。

all.en: On behalf of the leadership team, we extend our sincere appreciation for your dedication throughout the year.
all.zh: 謹代表領導團隊，向各位致上對全年投入的誠摯感謝。

all.en: All routine maintenance work that requires building access must be scheduled with the facilities team during regular operating days only.
all.zh: 凡需進入辦公大樓的例行維護作業，僅可於正常營業日與總務團隊預約進行。

all.en: Lighting in non-essential common areas will be dimmed automatically during the holiday closure to support our energy conservation efforts.
all.zh: 為配合節能措施，非必要公共區域的照明將於休假期間自動調暗。

all.en: Office plants will be cared for by a contracted service to ensure they remain healthy throughout the extended closure.
all.zh: 辦公室內植栽將由特約服務人員照料，確保其在長假期間保持健康。

all.en: Our customer hotline will be staffed by a small team of agents handling priority cases only during the holiday period.
all.zh: 假期間客服專線將由小型團隊值班，僅處理優先案件。

all.en: Please update any active project documentation before leaving so that on-call colleagues can respond effectively to urgent issues.
all.zh: 請於離開前更新所有進行中專案的相關文件，使值班同仁能有效處理緊急狀況。

all.en: International offices will follow their local public holiday calendars, and regional managers will share specific schedules separately.
all.zh: 海外辦公室將依當地國定假日行事曆運作，相關區域主管將另行公告具體時程。

all.en: Workshops and external client engagements scheduled during the closure window have been rescheduled with prior written agreement.
all.zh: 原定於休假期間舉辦的工作坊與外部客戶會議，已於事前書面同意下重新安排時程。

all.en: Reception desks will resume normal operating hours on Monday morning, and visitors must register through our standard sign-in process.
all.zh: 前台將於週一上午恢復正常服務時間，訪客須依本公司標準登記流程進行報到。

all.en: Please ensure that your laptop and mobile work device are fully charged before the closure to support any approved remote work.
all.zh: 請於休假開始前將您的筆電與行動辦公裝置充飽電，以利核可範圍內的遠端工作。

all.en: We wish each of you a refreshing break and look forward to welcoming you back to the office on January fourth.
all.zh: 祝願各位享有一段恢復活力的休假，期待於一月四日歡迎您回到辦公室。
